## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes.
- [ ] Documentation matches behavior.
- [ ] No secrets, generated reports, or private repository data included.
- [ ] Deterministic evidence remains separate from model interpretation.
